name: EASTERN CO
summary: The Eastern Company designs, manufactures, and sells engineered solutions for industrial markets through its Engineered Solutions segment. Products include turnkey returnable packaging solutions, access and security hardware (rotary latches, compression latches, hinges, camlocks, padlocks), proprietary vision technology (mirrors, mirror-cameras), and blow mold tooling. Key subsidiaries include Big 3 Precision, Eberhard Manufacturing, Hallink Moulds, and Velvac. The company serves commercial transportation, logistics, automotive OEMs, heavy-duty truck, food, beverage, healthcare, and aerospace markets globally.

products.name: Turnkey Returnable Packaging Solutions
products.description: Custom returnable transport packaging integrated with OEM assembly processes for vehicles, aircraft, and durable goods.

products.name: Blow Mold Tools
products.description: Design and manufacture of blow mold tools for plastic packaging and consumer goods production.

products.name: Injection Blow Mold Tooling
products.description: 2-step stretch blow molds and related components for food, beverage, healthcare, and chemical industries.

products.name: Access and Security Hardware
products.description: Rotary latches, compression latches, draw latches, hinges, camlocks, key switches, padlocks, and handles for industrial and OEM applications.

products.name: Custom Electromechanical Systems
products.description: Custom electromechanical and mechanical systems designed for specific OEM and customer applications.

products.name: Proprietary Vision Technology
products.description: Mirrors and mirror-cameras for OEM and aftermarket heavy-duty truck, motorhome, and bus markets.

products.name: Aftermarket Truck Components
products.description: Aftermarket components for heavy- and medium-duty truck markets in North America.

partnerships.description: Big 3 Products works with leading OEMs to design and produce custom returnable transport packaging for assembly processes.
